tagline: Remember Her — a story that stays with you.
description: An intimate portrait of memory, love, and the echoes we leave behind.

neuralTech.sectionTitle: Emerging Themes: Neural Technology & Human Perception
neuralTech.intro: REMEMBER HER also enters into one of the most important conversations of our time: the intersection of human cognition and advancing technology.
neuralTech.experienceDescription: The series explores Elizabeth Rothschild's personal experience with what she describes as unexplained cognitive disruption, irregular digital interactions, and the presence of structured information appearing without clear origin.
neuralTech.centralQuestion: What happens as technology moves closer to the human mind?
neuralTech.personalStatement: I'm not here to tell people what to believe. I'm here to share what I experienced — and why I think we need to be paying closer attention to how technology is evolving around the human mind.
